modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to add WebEx plug-in to Outlook 2016.

full_description_text:  
I’m trying to figure out how to add the WebEx plug-in to my Outlook 2016, but I’m really stuck. I’ve got the WebEx Productivity Tools installed, but it just doesn’t seem to work. I thought it would be easy, but I can’t find the right options anywhere. It’s a bit frustrating because I need it for my meetings!
short_description: Unable to add WebEx plug-in to Outlook 2016.
